query:
SELECT
                bt.id AS token_id,
                bt.bot_id,
                bt.token,
                bt.label,
                bt.last_used_at,
                bt.expires_at,
                bt.revoked_at,
                bt.created_at,
                b.kind
            FROM bot_tokens bt
            JOIN bots b ON b.id = bt.bot_id
            JOIN comms_channel_participants cp
              ON cp.channel_id = $1
             AND cp.user_id = ('bot|' || b.id::text)
             AND cp.left_at IS NULL
            WHERE bt.token = $2
              AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
